sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root חָזָה).-

(1) a divine vision [“a vision, spoken of a divine vision or dream, Isa 29:7 specially a vision from God respecting future events, prophetic vision, Lam 2:9 Mic 3:6 Psa 89:20 ”], Dan 1:17 8:1 9:24 . Hence-

(2) generally a divine revelation, 1Sa 3:1 1Ch 17:15 Pro 29:18.

(3) an oracle, often collectively (compare ὄραμα, Act 12:5 16:9 ), Isa 1:1 Oba 1:1 Nah 1:1. [This reference is omitted very rightly in Thes.].
